stories.headline: Elliot Page Shows Off Ripped Physique After Getting "Hooked" on Boxing - E! Online
stories.summary: Elliot Page shared a photo of his six-pack abs after taking up boxing as a hobby, quipping, "Just be warned, you may end up getting as hooked as I am."

stories.headline: SmackDown SPOILERS for July 3: WWE Champion Sami Zayn - Cageside Seats
stories.summary: WARNING: SPOILERS ahead, for anyone who wants to know what will happen on SmackDown this Friday night.

stories.headline: Director Carl Rinsch is sentenced to prison in $11M fraud case over unfinished Netflix show - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
stories.summary: Hollywood writer-director Carl Rinsch has been sentenced to 2 1/2 years in prison after being convicted of conning Netflix out of $11 million for a never-finished sci-fi show

stories.headline: ‘DWTS’ alums Peta Murgatroyd and Maks Chmerkovskiy tear up over major move: ‘Best decision for our family’ - Page Six
stories.summary: The pro dancers emotionally announced a big life change for themselves and their three young sons.

stories.headline: Cara Delevingne Says She Dated Amber Heard Through Johnny Depp Divorce - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: "She was also entangled with other people," the British actress tells Louis Theroux on the broadcaster's latest podcast episode. "Well, with Elon [Musk]," he responds.

stories.headline: Why The Back-to-Back Street Fighter 6 Evo Champion MenaRD Switched Off His Main in the Finals - IGN
stories.summary: We asked Evo Champ MenaRD why he decided to switch off the character he's most known for playing in the highest stakes matches of the Street Fighter 6 tournament.

stories.headline: ‘Persona’ Live-Action TV Adaptation in the Works at Netflix, 21 Laps & Story Kitchen to Produce (EXCLUSIVE) - Variety
stories.summary: Netflix is developing a live-action series based on the "Persona" video game franchise, Variety has learned from sources.
